articles.title: U.S. renews strikes on Iran, citing threats posed to American troops - The Washington Post
articles.description: The attacks in southern Iran prompted Tehran to warn that it reserves the right to retaliate, complicating negotiations to end the war.

articles.title: Doctor evacuated from Congo is ‘helpless’ watching colleagues die of Ebola - The Washington Post
articles.description: As Patrick LaRochelle waits in a specialized hospital room in Prague to see whether he has Ebola, his former colleagues in Congo are beginning to die of the deadly disease.

articles.title: New York Knicks advance to first NBA Finals since 1999 - NBC News
articles.description: The Knicks swept the Cleveland Cavaliers to advance to the NBA Finals, where they will await either Oklahoma City or San Antonio.

articles.title: Iran’s Khamenei Says No Going Back For Middle East Rocked by War - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei said US military bases in the Middle East will no longer be safe after the war, declaring victory and a new regional order even as talks to end the conflict continued.

articles.title: BTS Wins Artist of the Year at 2026 American Music Awards; Taylor Swift Goes 0-8 - Billboard
articles.description: BTS won artist of the year for the second time at the 2026 American Music Awards, which were presented on Monday (May 25). Taylor Swift went 0-8.

articles.title: Trump demands more countries sign Abraham Accords as part of Iran deal - France 24
articles.description: US President Donald Trump said Monday it should be "mandatory" for countries including Saudi Arabia, Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt and Jordan to join the Abraham Accords normalising ties with Israel as part of any agreement to end the war with Iran, in a move that …

articles.title: China Expands Travel Curbs to Top AI Talent at Private Firms - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: China is restricting overseas travel for top AI professionals in private firms such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and DeepSeek, suggesting an escalation in measures intended to safeguard its technology and catch up to the US in a pivotal sphere.

articles.title: DRC is no stranger to Ebola outbreaks. Why isn’t there a vaccine or treatment to help now? - CNN
articles.description: The fast-growing Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo came to the world’s attention only a little more than a week ago and is already the third-largest on record. But it’s the 17th outbreak the country has dealt with since the virus was discover…

articles.title: Attacks from residents complicate the fight against a rare type of Ebola - NPR
articles.description: Three times in the past week, healthcare facilities have been attacked. On Sunday, angry young men stormed a hospital treating Ebola patients, forcing medical staff to evacuate them as gunfire rang out.

articles.title: Tatsuya Imai, Astros Throw Combined No-Hitter in Win vs. Rangers, Box Score Stats, Highlights - Bleacher Report
articles.description: The Texas Rangers did not have a hit on Monday night.

articles.title: SEC commissioner Greg Sankey opens spring meetings with CFP format shot: 'Positions seem to change a lot' - On3
articles.description: Greg Sankey opened SEC spring meetings in Destin by calling out the Big Ten's CFP format reversal and state of college sports.

articles.title: Cavs embarrassed in Game 4 of Eastern Conference finals, 130-93, swept out of playoffs by Knicks - Cleveland.com
Canadian PM slams Ben Gvir video of Gaza flotilla activists - Israel National News
articles.description: In a conversation with President Isaac Herzog, Canadian PM Mark Carney slams Israel over what he terms the "unacceptable" treatment of flotilla activists.

articles.title: Box Office Global: 'Mandalorian & Grogu' $163M, 'Michael' Nears $800M WW - Deadline
articles.description: 'Mandalorian and Grogu' opened to $163M WW leading global weekend box office. 'Michael' is nearing $800M WW and 'Dear You' is conquering China.

articles.title: The Virtual OS Museum is a fantastic project that lets you run Mac OS, A/UX, NeXTSTEP, more - 9to5Mac
articles.description: If you’ve ever wondered what it felt like to use the many operating systems Apple (and NeXT) released over the past 40-plus years, The Virtual OS Museum has got you covered, and then some.

articles.title: Texas GOP Senate candidates scarce in public but unavoidable on TV in final day of runoff campaign - AP News
articles.description: Texas Republican Senate candidates Sen. John Cornyn and state Attorney General Ken Paxton are going to be scarcely visible in public on the last day of campaigning ahead of Tuesday's runoff. But their faces will be unavoidable on TV, given their heavy final r…

articles.title: Sennheiser’s new Momentum 5 headphones have upgraded ANC and a replaceable battery - The Verge
articles.description: Sennheiser updated its Momentum wireless headphones after nearly 4 years with better ANC, support for lossless Bluetooth audio, and a user-swappable battery.
